
## Raw rules

```css
:root { --direction: 1; }

@layer front-tokens, normalize, base-components, markdown-renderer, nds-tokens, front-client-ui, front-ui-normalize, front-ui-utilities, front-ui-foundations, front-ui-atoms, front-ui-components;

@layer front-tokens {
  @layer base, dark, palette, palette-dark;
}

@layer normalize {
  html { font-family: sans-serif; text-size-adjust: 100%; }
  body { margin: 0px; }
  article, aside, details, figcaption, figure, footer, header, hgroup, main, menu, nav, section { display: block; }
  audio, canvas, progress, video { display: inline-block; vertical-align: initial; }
  audio:not([controls]) { display: none; height: 0px; }
  [hidden], template { display: none; }


@layer front-ui-utilities {
  .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
  .flex-row { flex-direction: row; }
  .flex-col-reverse { flex-direction: column-reverse; }
  .flex-row-reverse { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
  @media (min-width: 600px) {
  .sm\:flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
  .sm\:flex-row { flex-direction: row; }
  .sm\:flex-col-reverse { flex-direction: column-reverse; }
  .sm\:flex

:root { --em-ratio-0-1: 0.1em; --link-underline-offset: var(--em-ratio-0-1); --grid-column-width: 1fr; --grid-gutter: 28px; --grid-sm-gutter: 12px; --grid-columns: 12; --spacing-block-s: 20px; --spacing-block-m: 24px; --spacing-block-l: 32px; --size-block-header-icon: 26px; }

.appear-instantly { animation: 0ms linear 0s 1 normal none running fadeIn; }

.fade-in-fastest { animation: 0.15s linear 0s 1 normal none running fadeIn; }

.fade-in-fast { animation: 0.25s ease-in 0s 1 normal none running fadeIn; }

.fade-in-slow { animation: 0.5s ease-in 0s 1 normal none running fadeIn; }

.fade-out-fast { animation: 0.25s ease-out 0s 1 normal none running fadeOut; }

.fade-out-slow { animation: 0.5s ease-out 0s 1 normal none running fadeOut; }

.scale-in-fast { animation: 0.25s ease-in 0s 1 normal none running scaleIn; }

.scale-out-fast { animation: 0.25s ease-out 0s 1 normal none running scaleOut; }

.pop-in { animation: 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) 0s 1 normal none running popIn; }

.loading-spinner { margin: 0px auto; animation: 1s linear 0s infinite normal none running rotate; transform-origin: center center; width: 1em; height: 1em; opacity: 0.5; display: block; pointer-events: none; }

.animation--paused { animation-play-state: paused; }

.animation--running { animation-play-state: running; }

body .tf-v1-popup .tf-v1-close { text-indent: -999px; width: 24px; height: 24px; top: -30px; right: -30px; display: block; overflow: hidden; background-image: url("/_next/static/media/close.c12245f9.svg"); background-size: cover; opacity: 1; transition: none; }

body .tf-v1-popup .tf-v1-close:hover { opacity: 0.75; }

*, ::after, ::before { box-sizing: border-box; }

:is(:lang(fr), :lang(es-es)) * { quotes: "«" "»" "‹" "›"; }

:is(:lang(ko)) * { word-break: keep-all; hyphens: none; line-break: strict; }

body, html { font-size: 16px; cursor: default; background: var(--color-background-base); color: var(--color-text-strong); font-family: var(--font-family-sans); line-height: 1.5; text-wrap: pretty; scroll-behavior: smooth; container-type: inline-size; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; font-variant-numeric: lining-nums; font-feature-settings: "lnum", "locl" 0, "lnum"; scroll-padding-block-start: 

html { overflow-x: clip; overflow-inline: clip; scroll-snap-type: y; hyphenate-limit-chars: var(--hyphens-length) var(--hyphens-before) var(--hyphens-after); }

:is(:lang(de)) html { white-space: normal; hyphens: auto; --hyphens-before: 2; --hyphens-after: 2; --hyphens-lines: 2; --hyphens-length: 6; }

:is(:lang(fr)) html { white-space: normal; hyphens: auto; --hyphens-before: 3; --hyphens-after: 3; --hyphens-lines: 1; --hyphens-length: 8; }

:is(:lang(en)) html { --hyphens-before: 5; --hyphens-after: 5; --hyphens-lines: 1; --hyphens-length: 12; }

:root { --global-navigation-height: 64px; --base-padding: 20px; --border-color-regular: #00000014; --text-color-extra-light: #0003; --text-color-light: #0006; --text-color-medium: #0009; --text-color-dark: #111; --text-color-regular: #040404; --spacing-xs: 20px; --spacing-s: 40px; --spacing-m: 40px; --spacing-l: 60px; --spacing-xl: 60px; --header-height: 60px; interpolate-size: allow-keywords; }

a { color: var(--color-text-strong); }

input[type="submit"], input[type="text"] { appearance: none; }

svg { fill: currentcolor; }

:focus:not(:focus-visible) { outline: 0px; }

::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-muted); opacity: 1; }

html[lang="zh-tw"] { --font-family-serif: var(--font-family-serif-chinese-traditional); }

html[lang="zh-cn"] { --font-family-serif: var(--font-family-serif-chinese-simplified); }

html[lang="ja-jp"] { --font-family-serif: var(--font-family-serif-japanese); }

html[lang="vi-vn"] { --font-family-sans: var(--font-family-sans-vietnamese); --font-family-serif: var(--font-family-serif-vietnamese); }

html[lang="ar-sa"], html[lang="ar"] { --font-family-sans: var(--font-family-sans-arabic); }

html[lang="he-il"], html[lang="he"] { --font-family-sans: var(--font-family-sans-hebrew); }

video { isolation: isolate; }

:root { --border-radius-0: 0; --border-radius-200: 0.25rem; --border-radius-300: 0.3125rem; --border-radius-400: 0.375rem; --border-radius-500: 0.5rem; --border-radius-600: 0.625rem; --border-radius-700: 0.75rem; --border-radius-800: 0.875rem; --border-radius-900: 1rem; --border-radius-round: 624.9375rem; --border-width-1: 0.0625rem; --border-width-2: 0.125rem; --border-width-4: 0.25rem; --border-

@layer front-tokens.base {
  .base_theme__FJXCL, .blue_theme__VG1s8 { --color-navigation: var(--color-gray-200); --color-navigation-dropdown: var(--color-white); --color-navigation-dropdown-hover: var(--color-gray-200); }
  .dark_theme__OrDLM { --color-navigation: var(--color-black); --color-navigation-dropdown: var(--color-gray-900); --color-navigation-dropdown-hover: var(--color-black); --color-

@layer front-tokens.palette {
  .devPlatform_palette_theme__rni97 { --typography-interaction-menu-button-font: var(--font-weight-medium) var(--font-size-100) /var(--font-line-height-100) var(--font-family-sans); --typography-interaction-menu-button-letter-spacing: 0; --border-radius-base: var(--border-radius-0); --border-card-radius: var(--border-radius-0); --border-badge-radius: var(--border-radi

@layer front-tokens.dark {
  .dark_palette_theme__mc9Q9 { --color-interaction-focus-ring: var(--color-blue-400); --color-interaction-indicator: var(--color-alpha-white-200); --color-interaction-indicator-selected: var(--color-alpha-white-400); --color-interaction-control-background: var(--color-alpha-white-100); --color-interaction-control-background-checked: var( --color-alpha-white-900 ); --colo

@layer front-tokens.palette {
  .gray_palette_theme__hiL_U { --color-accent: var(--color-gray-400); --color-accent-strong: var(--color-gray-500); --color-accent-soft: var(--color-gray-200); --color-accent-muted: var(--color-gray-100); --color-background-surface-accent: var(--color-gray-400); --color-background-surface-accent-hover: var(--color-gray-500); --color-background-surface-accent-focus: va

@layer front-tokens.base {
  .yellow_theme__HjC88 { --color-navigation: var(--color-gray-200); --color-navigation-dropdown: var(--color-white); --color-navigation-dropdown-hover: var(--color-gray-200); }
}

@layer front-ui-normalize, front-ui-utilities, front-ui-foundations, front-ui-atoms, front-ui-components;

@layer front-ui-normalize {
  .theme_theme__XHAvb { hyphenate-limit-chars: var(--hyphens-length) var(--hyphens-before) var(--hyphens-after); color: var(--color-text-normal); background-color: var(--color-background-base); }
  :is(:lang(de)) .theme_theme__XHAvb { white-space: normal; hyphens: auto; --hyphens-before: 2; --hyphens-after: 2; --hyphens-lines: 2; --hyphens-length: 6; }
  :is(:lang(fr)) 

.appErrorBoundary_main__ofS4r { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; margin: var(--spacing-m) auto; max-width: 940px; }

.appErrorBoundary_heading__TKwvS { font: var(--typography-sans-700-bold-font); letter-spacing: var(--typography-sans-700-bold-letter-spacing); margin-top: 30px; }

.appErrorBoundary_reload__pdxU2 { font: var(--typography-sans-400-regular-font); letter-spacing: var(--typography-sans-400-regular-letter-spacing); display: block; margin-top: 10px; color: var(--color-red-500); border: 0px; background: none; text-decoration: underline 1px; text-underline-offset: 0.1em; }

@layer front-ui-foundations {
  .semanticTypography_semanticTypography__mWJkv { margin-block: 0px; }
  .semanticTypography_semanticTypography__mWJkv a, a.semanticTypography_semanticTypography__mWJkv { color: var(--color-link-primary-text); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; text-underline-offset: var(--link-underline-offset); text-decor

.Arrow_arrow__oVjWc { transform: scaleX(var(--direction)); display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; text-indent: 0px; }

.Arrow_arrow__oVjWc.Arrow_arrowAfter__8m7lp { margin-inline-start: 0.2em; }

.Arrow_arrow__oVjWc.Arrow_arrowBefore__hmn_k { margin-inline-end: 0.2em; }

.loadingDots_dot__T4Wmc { --loading-dots-time-constant: 125ms; --loading-dots-pause: calc(0.75 * var(--loading-dots-time-constant)); --loading-dots-animation-duration: calc(var(--loading-dots-length) * var(--loading-dots-time-constant) + var(--loading-dots-pause)); animation-duration: ; animation-timing-function: ; animation-iteration-count: ; animation-direction: ; animation-fill-mode: ; animatio

@layer base-components {
  .typography_typography__Exx2D { margin: 0px; font: var(--typography-font); letter-spacing: var(--typography-letter-spacing); color: var(--typography-color); }
  @media (min-width: 600px) {
  .typography_typography__Exx2D { font: var(--typography-font-sm); letter-spacing: var(--typography-letter-spacing-sm); }
}
  .typography_typography__Exx2D[hidden] { display: none; }
}

@layer front-ui-atoms {
  .arrow_arrow___6mKn { text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; text-indent: 0px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; }

.text-growth-display-lg { font-family: var(--typeface-growth-display-lg-family),var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-growth-display-lg-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-growth-display-lg-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-growth-display-lg-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-growth-display-lg-line-height); }

.text-growth-display-md { font-family: var(--typeface-growth-display-md-family),var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-growth-display-md-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-growth-display-md-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-growth-display-md-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-growth-display-md-line-height); }

.text-growth-display-sm { font-family: var(--typeface-growth-display-sm-family),var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-growth-display-sm-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-growth-display-sm-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-growth-display-sm-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-growth-display-sm-line-height); }

.text-growth-display-xs { font-family: var(--typeface-growth-display-xs-family),var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-growth-display-xs-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-growth-display-xs-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-growth-display-xs-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-growth-display-xs-line-height); }

.text-growth-display-xxs { font-family: var(--typeface-growth-display-xxs-family),var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-growth-display-xxs-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-growth-display-xxs-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-growth-display-xxs-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-growth-display-xxs-line-height); }

.zp-throw-row-view-icon { display: inline-block; position: relative; top: 2px; }

.zp-send-later-icon { padding: 0px 8px; }

.zp-send-later-icon img { height: 16px !important; width: auto !important; }

.zp-message-view-tracking-icon { position: relative; top: 4px; }

.inboxsdk__compose_statusbarActive .aDj > .aDh, .inboxsdk__size_fixer :is(.aDg, .aDj) { height: auto !important; }

.inboxsdk__appButton { background: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border: 1px solid rgb(218, 220, 224); border-radius: 5em; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px 36px 2px 14px; }

.inboxsdk__appButton:hover { background: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

.inboxsdk__appButton a:hover { text-decoration: none !important; }

.inboxsdk__appButton__clicked, .inboxsdk__appButton__clicked:hover { background: rgb(228, 228, 228); }

.inboxsdk__appButton_title { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-primary); font-family: var(--system-ui); font-size: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-size); font-weight: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-weight); letter-spacing: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-letter-spacing); line-height: var(--typeface-body-lg-medium-line-height); position: relative; }

.inboxsdk__appButton_title::after { border-left: 5px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: var(--radius-xxs); border-right: 5px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-top: 5px solid rgb(96, 99, 103); bottom: 5px; content: ""; height: 0px; position: absolute; right: -18px; width: 0px; }

.zp-14-1-3-zp-fixed { position: fixed !important; }

.bkK { position: relative; }

.inboxsdk__compose_statusbarActive .aDj.aDi { bottom: 0px !important; height: auto !important; }

.inboxsdk__compose_statusbarActive .aDj.aDi .aC3 { height: 0px !important; }

.inboxsdk__navItem_name[title="Apollo"] { margin-left: 5px; }

:root { --apollo-sidebar-button-size: 40px; --apollo-sidebar-icon-size: 20px; --apollo-sidebar-hover-bg: #0000000a; --apollo-sidebar-focus-bg: #00000014; --apollo-sidebar-hover-opacity: 0.8; --apollo-sidebar-transition: all 0.2s ease; --apollo-sidebar-z-input: 2; --apollo-sidebar-z-icon: 1; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: center; position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:hover .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] :is(.apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus, .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-within) .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: var(--apollo-sidebar-focus-bg); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-visible { outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-container { align-items: center; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); justify-content: center; min-height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); min-width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: inherit; cursor: pointer; height: 100%; left: 0px; opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%; z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-input); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:hover { box-shadow: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon { flex-shrink: 0; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); pointer-events: none; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-icon); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon[style*="display: none"]::before { content: "⚪"; display: block; font-size: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }

[class*="inboxsdk__expando"] { background-position: 4px center !important; }

[class*="zp-message-view-add-to-sequence-icon-"], [class*="zp-message-view-events-icon-"] { height: 0px; width: 0px; }

[id="GmailSidebar"] { height: 100%; }

.expand-iframe { width: 100%; }

.expand-gmail-iframe-container { left: 0px; position: fixed; top: 0px; width: 100vw; z-index: 1000; }

.iframe-body-expanded { margin-left: auto; width: 300px; }

.hubspot-iframe-expanded, .iframe-expanded, .linkedin-iframe-expanded, .salesforce-iframe-expanded { height: 100vh !important; max-height: unset !important; top: 0px !important; width: 100vw !important; }

.hubspot-iframe-expanded[id="hubspot-toolbar-iframe"], .hubspot-iframe-expanded[id="salesforce-toolbar-iframe"], .iframe-expanded[id="hubspot-toolbar-iframe"], .iframe-expanded[id="salesforce-toolbar-iframe"], .linkedin-iframe-expanded[id="hubspot-toolbar-iframe"], .linkedin-iframe-expanded[id="salesforce-toolbar-iframe"], .salesforce-iframe-expanded[id="hubspot-toolbar-iframe"], .salesforce-ifram

.ext-iframe .iframe-overlay > div { max-width: 280px; }

[class*="inboxsdk__button_selectedIndicator"] { background-color: rgb(66, 133, 244) !important; border-radius: 0 var(--radius-sm) var(--radius-sm) 0 !important; }

.inboxsdk__compose_notice { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) !important; border-width: medium !important; border-style: none !important; border-color: currentcolor !important; border-image: initial !important; margin: 0px !important; padding: 0px !important; }

body.inboxsdk__gmailv1css .toolbar { border-top: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar { padding-right: 2px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 2px; margin-bottom: 0px !important; padding-top: 4px !important; }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) table ~ .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar { margin-bottom: 8px !important; }

body:not(.inboxsdk__gmailv1css) table ~ .inboxsdk__compose_statusbar .toolbar { border-bottom: 0px; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default); }

.I5 > .iN > tbody > tr { display: grid; }

:is(.inlineEditWriteHidden:hover, .inlineEditWriteVisible:hover) .zp-mini-toolbar { right: 17px; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); box-shadow: none; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > .zp-button, .is-extension .zp-button-group > span > .zp-button { border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > .zp-button:hover, .is-extension .zp-button-group > span > .zp-button:hover { box-shadow: none; }

.is-extension .zp-button-group > span + span:not(:first-child) { border-left: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }

.is-extension .zp-button { background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--color-base-sand-10),var(--color-base-sand-10)); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); box-shadow: none; color: var(--color-ui-text-base-secondary); }

.is-extension .zp-button .zp-icon { color: var(--color-base-sand-60); }

.is-extension .zp-button .zp-icon:hover { color: var(--color-base-sand-70); }

.is-extension .zp-button:hover { color: var(--color-ui-text-base-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--color-ui-border-default) !important; }

.is-extension .zp-button:hover .zp-icon { color: var(--color-base-sand-70); }

body.prevent-external-overrides .zp-modal { z-index: 20000 !important; }

/* === @keyframes === */

@keyframes fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes scaleIn { 
  0% { transform: scale(0.975); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes scaleOut { 
  0% { transform: scale(1); }
  100% { transform: scale(0.975); }
}

@keyframes popIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.75); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes rotate {

  100% { transform: rotate(1turn) translateZ(0px); }

@keyframes bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  20% { transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  40% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.03, 1.03, 1.03); }
  80% { transform: scale3d(0.97, 0.97, 0.97); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); }
}

@keyframes bounceOut { 
  20% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  50%, 55% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
}

  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }

  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

  60% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 25px, 0px); }
  75% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  90% { transform: translate3d(0px, 5px, 0px); }
  100% { transform: none; }
}

@keyframes bounceOutUp {

  40%, 45% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 20px, 0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -2000px, 0px); }
```
